metadata.source: Global Meridien Bank - Market Risk Stress Testing Framework
metadata.description: Comprehensive risk factor shock library for pillar stress scenario generation - Global Meridien Bank

rates.description: Interest rate curve shocks in basis points across all tenors

fx.description: FX shock as change in value of 1 USD (decimal format, e.g., 0.14 = 14% depreciation)

credit.description: Credit spread relative moves by sector and region with beta multipliers

structure.description: Each region has a base credit spread move, multiplied by sector-specific beta
structure.formula: Total Spread Move = Base Spread Move (%) × Sector Beta

credit.note: Specific sector betas vary by scenario. Energy/Materials typically have higher betas (1.5) in commodity-related scenarios.

CPC & GDD.name: Commodity Price Collapse & Global Double Dip

energy.description: Energy commodity shocks as relative price moves and absolute volatility shocks

precious_metals.description: Precious metals shocks: relative price, relative volatility, absolute lease rate (bps)

shock_types.volatility: Relative shock (percentage) - NOTE: Changed from absolute to relative per 2024 review

precious_metals.historical_note: Vol shocks changed from Absolute to Relative in annual review per Murex migration

base_metals.description: Base metals shocks: relative price and absolute volatility

murex_migration.description: Base Metals moving to Murex will enable term structure shocks and vol surface granularity
enhancements: Tenor-specific shocks to capture calendar spread stress
Volatility surface shocks (vs current parallel shocks)

Iron Ore.note: Removed from scenarios - desk no longer trades

equities.description: Equity index and sector shocks as percentage price moves

structure.description: Direct percentage shock to equity index level and sector returns
structure.index_unit: Percentage price change from current level
structure.sector_unit: Percentage price change from current level
